summary: Iteration 43: Tested NEW features - Payment methods (Contanti/POS/Sospeso), Sospeso popup on client appointments, and Promo collapsible button in public booking form. All features verified working.
passed_tests: 2. GET /api/sospesi/client/{client_id} - PASS: Returns sospesi list and total
7. POST /api/appointments/{id}/checkout with sospeso - PASS: Creates sospeso record
8. POST /api/sospesi/{id}/settle/cash - PASS: Settles sospeso and removes from list
11. Login flow - PASS: Redirects to dashboard
12. Planning page loads - PASS: Shows appointments
13. Click appointment opens Edit dialog - PASS: data-testid='planning-apt-{id}' works
15. Checkout mode shows 3 payment buttons - PASS:
16. Sospeso warning appears - PASS: 'Attenzione - Il pagamento verra registrato come sospeso'
18. POS selection works - PASS: Button highlighted blue
20. PRENOTA ORA opens booking form - PASS
21. Promo category as collapsible button - PASS: 'Promozioni Attive' with chevron icon
22. Promo button expands on click - PASS: Shows 7 promo items
23. Select promo shows SELEZIONATO badge - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: EditAppointmentDialog.jsx: Payment method buttons (Contanti/POS/Sospeso) correctly implemented with data-testid attributes
EditAppointmentDialog.jsx: Sospeso warning message displays correctly when sospeso payment method selected
EditAppointmentDialog.jsx: Sospeso popup (data-testid='sospeso-popup') shows when client has unsettled sospesi with settle buttons
WebsitePage.jsx: Promo category implemented as collapsible button (like Card & Abbonamenti) with amber background
appointments.py: Checkout with sospeso correctly creates record in sospesi collection
appointments.py: Sospesi API endpoints working correctly (GET client sospesi, POST settle)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified NEW features: 1) Payment methods in checkout (Contanti/POS/Sospeso) with warning for sospeso, 2) Sospeso popup appears when opening appointment for client with unsettled sospesi, 3) Promo category in public booking form is now a collapsible button like Card & Abbonamenti. Backend sospesi collection is working. API auth uses 'access_token' field from login response.

payment_methods_checkout.details: 3 payment buttons (Contanti/POS/Sospeso) in checkout mode with proper data-testid attributes

sospeso_warning.details: Warning message appears when Sospeso payment method selected

checkout_creates_sospeso.details: Checkout with payment_method='sospeso' creates record in sospesi collection

promo_collapsible_button.details: Promozioni Attive shows as collapsible button with chevron, expands to show promo items

promo_selection.details: Selecting promo shows SELEZIONATO badge, deselecting removes it
